nodes.name: Black-bellied starling
nodes.summary: Black-bellied starling（Notopholia corusca）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Black-bellied starling。

nodes.name: Black-bellied starling
nodes.summary: The black-bellied starling (Notopholia corusca) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae, originally described by zoologist Alexander von Nordmann in 1835. It is found in Eswatini, Kenya, Mozambique, Somalia, South Africa, Tanzania, and Zimbabwe. Their iris color changes by mood or behavior due to fluctuations in blood flow rates. References External links Black-bellied (glossy) starling – Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds
